glosses.vi: tình dục; liên quan đến tình dục
glosses.ja: 性的な; 性に関する

sentences.target: On parle d'éducation sexuelle à l'école.

translations.fr: On parle d'éducation sexuelle à l'école.
translations.en: We're talking about sex education at school.
translations.es: Estamos hablando de educación sexual en la escuela.
translations.de: Wir sprechen in der Schule über Sexualerziehung.
translations.it: Parliamo di educazione sessuale a scuola.
translations.ko: 우리는 학교에서 성교육에 대해 이야기하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在学校谈论性教育。
translations.yue: 我哋喺學校討論性教育。
translations.ru: Мы в школе обсуждаем половое воспитание.
translations.pt: Estamos falando de educação sexual na escola.
translations.he: אנחנו מדברים בבית הספר על חינוך מיני.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang nói về giáo dục giới tính ở trường.
translations.ar: نحن نتحدث عن التثقيف الجنسي في المدرسة.
translations.nl: We praten op school over seksuele voorlichting.
translations.uk: Ми говоримо в школі про статеве виховання.
translations.hu: Az iskolában a szexuális nevelésről beszélünk.
translations.hi: हम स्कूल में यौन शिक्षा के बारे में बात कर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Rozmawiamy w szkole o edukacji seksualnej.
translations.el: Μιλάμε στο σχολείο για τη σεξουαλική αγωγή.
translations.nb: Vi snakker om seksualundervisning på skolen.
translations.id: Kami sedang membicarakan pendidikan seksual di sekolah.
translations.sv: Vi pratar om sexualundervisning i skolan.
translations.ro: Vorbim despre educația sexuală la școală.
translations.cs: Ve škole mluvíme o sexuální výchově.
translations.da: Vi taler om seksualundervisning i skolen.
translations.ja: 学校で性教育について話しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/colloquial subject pronoun; here the grammatical subject of the clause.
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular), meaning 'to speak/talk'; selects 'de' for the topic.
Preposition 'de' elided before a vowel; introduces the noun complement indicating the topic.
Common noun; head of the prepositional complement governed by 'de'.
Attributive adjective; agrees in gender and number (feminine singular) with 'éducation'.
Preposition marking location; introduces the prepositional phrase.
Definite article elided before a vowel; agrees with the feminine singular noun 'école'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'à'.

sentences.target: Ton orientation sexuelle est respectée ici.

translations.fr: Ton orientation sexuelle est respectée ici.
translations.en: Your sexual orientation is respected here.
translations.es: Tu orientación sexual es respetada aquí.
translations.de: Deine sexuelle Orientierung wird hier respektiert.
translations.it: Il tuo orientamento sessuale è rispettato qui.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的性取向在这里受到尊重。
translations.yue: 你嘅性取向喺呢度受到尊重。
translations.pt: Sua orientação sexual é respeitada aqui.
translations.he: כאן מכבדים את הנטייה המינית שלך.
translations.vi: Khuynh hướng tình dục của bạn được tôn trọng ở đây.
translations.nl: Jouw seksuele geaardheid wordt hier gerespecteerd.
translations.hu: Itt tiszteletben tartják a szexuális orientációdat.
translations.hi: यहाँ आपकी यौन अभिविन्यास का सम्मान किया जाता है.
translations.pl: Twoja orientacja seksualna jest tutaj szanowana.
translations.el: Εδώ ο σεξουαλικός σου προσανατολισμός γίνεται σεβαστός.
translations.nb: Din seksuelle orientering blir respektert her.
translations.id: Orientasi seksual Anda dihormati di sini.
translations.ro: Orientarea ta sexuală este respectată aici.
translations.cs: Tvoje sexuální orientace je zde respektována.
translations.da: Din seksuelle orientering er respekteret her.
translations.ja: ここではあなたの性的指向が尊重されています。

tokens.explanation: Second-person singular possessive determiner; used before vowel-initial feminine nouns for euphony; modifies 'orientation'.
Common noun; head of the noun phrase and grammatical subject.
Attributive adjective; agrees in gender and number (feminine singular) with 'orientation'.
Auxiliary 'être' in present indicative (3rd person singular); forms the passive with the past participle.
Past participle used in passive voice; agrees feminine singular with the subject; predicate of the passive construction.
Adverb of place; modifies the clause, indicating location.

sentences.target: Nous proposons un atelier sur la santé sexuelle.
sentences.reading: /nu pʁɔpozɔ̃ œ̃ atəlje syʁ la sɑ̃te sɛk.sɥɛl/

translations.fr: Nous proposons un atelier sur la santé sexuelle.
translations.ipa: /nu pʁɔpozɔ̃ œ̃ atəlje syʁ la sɑ̃te sɛk.sɥɛl/
translations.en: We’re offering a workshop on sexual health.
translations.es: Ofrecemos un taller sobre salud sexual.
translations.de: Wir bieten einen Workshop zur sexuellen Gesundheit an.
translations.it: Offriamo un laboratorio sulla salute sessuale.
translations.ko: 우리는 성 건강에 관한 워크숍을 제공합니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们提供一场关于性健康的工作坊。
translations.yue: 我哋提供一個關於性健康嘅工作坊。
translations.ru: Мы предлагаем семинар по сексуальному здоровью.
translations.pt: Estamos oferecendo uma oficina sobre saúde sexual.
translations.he: אנחנו מציעים סדנה על בריאות מינית.
translations.tr: Cinsel sağlık üzerine bir atölye sunuyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tổ chức một hội thảo về sức khỏe tình dục.
translations.ar: نحن نقدم ورشة عمل عن الصحة الجنسية.
translations.nl: We bieden een workshop over seksuele gezondheid aan.
translations.uk: Ми пропонуємо семінар із сексуального здоров’я.
translations.hi: हम यौन स्वास्थ्य पर एक कार्यशाला आयोजित कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Προσφέρουμε ένα εργαστήριο για τη σεξουαλική υγεία.
translations.nb: Vi tilbyr et kurs om seksuell helse.
translations.id: Kami menawarkan lokakarya tentang kesehatan seksual.
translations.sv: Vi erbjuder en workshop om sexuell hälsa.
translations.ro: Oferim un atelier despre sănătatea sexuală.
translations.da: Vi tilbyder en workshop om seksuel sundhed.
translations.ja: 性の健康に関するワークショップを実施しています。

tokens.explanation: First-person plural subject pronoun; grammatical subject of the clause.
Main verb in present indicative (1st person plural); denotes offering/suggesting something.
Indefinite article; masculine singular determiner for 'atelier'.
Common noun; direct object of 'proposons'.
Preposition introducing the topic/theme of the workshop.
Definite article; feminine singular determiner for 'santé'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'sur'.
Attributive adjective; agrees in gender and number (feminine singular) with 'santé'.

sentences.target: Ils évitent les sujets sexuels en famille.
sentences.reading: /ilz evit le syʒɛ sɛk.sɥɛl ɑ̃ famij/

translations.fr: Ils évitent les sujets sexuels en famille.
translations.ipa: /ilz evit le syʒɛ sɛk.sɥɛl ɑ̃ famij/
translations.en: They avoid sexual topics with family.
translations.es: Evitan los temas sexuales en familia.
translations.de: Sie vermeiden sexuelle Themen in der Familie.
translations.it: Evitano gli argomenti sessuali in famiglia.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在家庭中回避性话题。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺屋企會迴避性話題。
translations.ru: Они избегают сексуальных тем в кругу семьи.
translations.pt: Eles evitam assuntos sexuais em família.
translations.vi: Họ tránh các chủ đề tình dục trong gia đình.
translations.ar: هم يتجنبون المواضيع الجنسية داخل الأسرة.
translations.nl: Ze vermijden seksuele onderwerpen binnen de familie.
translations.uk: Вони уникають сексуальних тем у родині.
translations.hu: A családban kerülik a szexuális témákat.
translations.hi: वे परिवार में यौन विषयों से बचते हैं.
translations.el: Αποφεύγουν τα σεξουαλικά θέματα στην οικογένεια.
translations.nb: De unngår seksuelle temaer i familien.
translations.id: Mereka menghindari topik seksual dalam keluarga.
translations.sv: De undviker sexuella ämnen i familjen.
translations.ro: Ei evită subiectele sexuale în familie.
translations.cs: Vyhýbají se sexuálním témатům v rodině.
translations.da: De undgår seksuelle emner i familien.
translations.ja: 彼らは家族の中で性的な話題を避けています.

tokens.explanation: Third-person plural subject pronoun (masculine default); subject of the clause; liaison typically realized before vowel-initial verb.
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person plural); takes a direct object.
Definite article; plural determiner for 'sujets'.
Common noun; plural; direct object of 'évitent'.
Attributive adjective; masculine plural agreeing with 'sujets'.
Preposition introducing the set phrase 'en famille' (in/with the family).
Common noun; complement of the preposition 'en'.
